post.content:
**Round 1 (DSA round - 1 hour) :**

Q1. Given an equation string, calculate the output of the equation. For example : ***(add(1,sub(5,add(1,2)))) gives output as 3***. Brackets will always be balanced and operands can be add, sub, mul, div.

Q2. Top K frequent elements (https://leetcode.com/problems/top-k-frequent-elements/)

Needed to code both solutions.

**Round 2 (Machine Coding - 1 hour) :**

There is a deployment package version management system. A package version can be compatible with the previous version if there is no data migration required for the deployment. Implement following two methods : 

1. *void addVersion(long versionnumber, bool isCompatibleWithPrev)*
2. *bool isCompatible(long version1, long version2)*

Write well structured and modular code.

**Round 3 (Hiring Manager - 1 hour) :**

Standard behavioural questions around team, conflicts and expectations.

**Round 4 (Bar raiser Design round - 1 hour) :**

I was asked to draw HLD of one of my projects, discussed the architecture and asked to justify the use of tech-stack. This took around 25 minutes. 
Then, I was asked to design(HLD) a chat application to send messages from one user to another. No group messages and call feature has to be implemented.
Congrats.\nRound 1/2 : Was the code required to be compiled/run or on google doc like G/Meta.
How did you implement the 2nd machine coding question?
Hi, congratulations. I did not understand the question in Round 2. Can you please explain it in more detail?
Hi op, kudos on getting the offer. Can you please share TC they\'ve offerd? And also which team?\nThanks a lot.
Result? Did you get the offer? How much experience do you have in total?
